title: Drodi's Villagers X FA (FA 10.X Patch)
description: Unofficial patch for Drodi's Villagers X Fresh Animations, fixes broken eye textures.
body:
A simple unofficial patch for Drodi's Villagers X Fresh Animations, That fixes the broken eye textures caused by Fresh Animations 10.X. 

Without Patch
![Without Patch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a05f1043e7ab394ee535390d864cd8b28124a351.png)
With Patch
![With Patch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bded3f60aa749c9b8e0ba982786e0e3e7c282ffd.png)


This patch will be removed if Drodi updates for FA 10.X. 

<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>

I am not related to Drodi's Villagers or Fresh Animations in any matter. please support the original artists; 
 
[Drodi](https://modrinth.com/user/Drodi) : Author of "Drodi's Villagers"
 
[Fresh XL](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX) : Creator of "Fresh Animations".

</details>
